typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		VIIDWFGUID as string,
		TCOO as string,
		CTO as string,
		{505 Indicator} as string,
		{505 Indicator (copy)} as string,
		{Adj Consequence Model Escalation Date} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ADJUSTED_CM_DT as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Application Support} as string,
		{Approved Deferred Remediation Date} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Approved Deferred Remediation Dt} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Asset Class} as string,
		{Asset SubClass} as string,
		ASSET_CI_TYPE as string,
		{CI Name} as string,
		{CIO Direct Org} as string,
		{CM Intake Filter} as boolean,
		{CM Vulnerability GroupID} as string,
		CM_CR_DATE as string,
		CM_INTAKE_DATE as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		CM_Intake_Flag as boolean,
		CM_PRE_EXCEPTION_NUMBER as string,
		CM_VAT_FALSE_POSITIVE as string,
		{Compliance Status} as boolean,
		{Consequence Model Escalation Date} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Consequence Model Escalation Date  } as string,
		{Data ID concat} as string,
		{Data Valid Concat} as string,
		{Data Validation ID } as double,
		DataSource as string,
		{Datasource Check} as double,
		{Date Logic} as boolean,
		{Deferred Remediation Date} as string,
		DMAN_EVENT_PRIMARY_APP_NM as string,
		Domain as string,
		{DRD Approval Status} as string,
		{DRD Jira #} as string,
		Escalation as string,
		{Escalation Period} as string,
		{Exception Number} as string,
		{Game Plan Link} as string,
		{HPSA Mesh Details} as string,
		JAVA_PATH_ID as string,
		{Last Update Date} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Managed By} as string,
		{Middleware Support} as string,
		{Non Path} as double,
		{Number of Records} as double,
		{OS Maintenance Support} as string,
		OverdueVulnInstanceCount as double,
		{Owned By } as string,
		PAI_Flag as boolean,
		Path as string,
		{Path } as string,
		{Path Ind} as string,
		{Path Vuln Chk} as double,
		Path_ProductName as string,
		{Pending Escalation} as boolean,
		{PRB Numb} as string,
		{PRB Number} as string,
		{PRM#} as string,
		{Product Name} as string,
		{PW Exception ID} as string,
		{PW Expiration Date} as string,
		{PW Expiration Dt} as string,
		{PW Overall Status} as string,
		QID as double,
		{QID Title} as string,
		QualysResults as string,
		{Qyls First Detected} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Qyls Last Detected} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Qyls Vuln_Status} as string,
		{RC Assignment} as string,
		{RC Due Date} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Record Creation Date} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Remed CR Number} as string,
		REMED_COMPETENCY_CENTER_COMMENTS_DESC as string,
		REMED_QVRU_ASSET_CLASS_NM as string,
		{REMED_RESEARCH_COMMENTS_DESC } as string,
		REMED_VO_DATA_ISSUE_NM as string,
		{Remediation CR Number} as string,
		ReportRunDate as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{SN CIO} as string,
		{SN LOB} as string,
		{SN Status} as string,
		SN_CR_NUMBER as string,
		{Solution Plan} as string,
		{Solution Plan Indicator} as boolean,
		{Special Care Add Date} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{System Role} as string,
		{Target Remediation Date} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Target Remediation Dt} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		{Technology Manager} as string,
		{Today dt} as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		today_ as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TSC_TECHNOPEDIA_ID as string,
		{Validation Description } as string,
		Version as string,
		VIID as string,
		VIIDWFGUID2 as string,
		{VIIDWFGUID + Path} as string,
		{VIIDWFGUID + Path Count} as double,
		{VIIDWFGUID Path Vulns} as string,
		{VIIDWFGUID w/o Path Vulns} as string,
		VIIDWFGUID_JAVAPATH as string,
		{VMT Competency} as string,
		{VO Remediation Status} as string,
		{VO Remediation Type} as string,
		{VO Remediation Type & VO Remediation Status } as string,
		{VO Remediation Type & VO Rememdiation Staus Chk} as double,
		VULN_SUB_CATEGORY_NM as string,
		{Vulnerability Type} as string,
		{VulnInstance Count} as string,
		{WF Fix} as string,
		{WF Rating} as string,
		WFGUID as string,
		{WO Number} as string,
		{WS Workstream Name} as string,
		{WS Workstream POC} as string,
		{Year of ReportRunDate} as double,
		Z_VulnType as string,
		{z1#1} as string,
		{z1#2} as string,
		{z10#1} as string,
		{z10#1 desc} as string,
		{z11#1} as string,
		{z11#2} as string,
		{z12#1} as string,
		{z12#1 desc} as string,
		{z12#2} as string,
		{z12#2 desc} as string,
		{z13#1} as string,
		{z14#1} as string,
		{z2#1} as string,
		{z2#2} as string,
		{z3#1} as string,
		{z3#2} as string,
		{z3#3} as string,
		{z4#1} as string,
		{z5#1} as string,
		{z5#2} as string,
		{z5#2 desc} as string,
		{z6#1} as string,
		{z7#1} as string,
		{z7#2} as string,
		{z7#2 desc} as string,
		{z8#1} as string,
		{z8#2} as string,
		{z8#3} as string,
		{z9#1} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> OOBReport
OOBReport select(mapColumn(
		VIIDWFGUID = VIIDWFGUID,
		TCOO = TCOO,
		CTO = CTO,
		{505 Indicator} = {505 Indicator},
		{505 Indicator (copy)} = {505 Indicator (copy)},

		{Compliance Status} = {Compliance Status},
		{Consequence Model Escalation Date} = {Consequence Model Escalation Date},

		{Date Logic} = {Date Logic},
		{Deferred Remediation Date} = {Deferred Remediation Date},
		DMAN_EVENT_PRIMARY_APP_NM = DMAN_EVENT_PRIMARY_APP_NM,
		Domain = Domain,
		{DRD Approval Status} = {DRD Approval Status},
		{DRD Jira #} = {DRD Jira #},
		Escalation = Escalation,
		{Escalation Period} = {Escalation Period},
		{Exception Number} = {Exception Number},
		{Game Plan Link} = {Game Plan Link},
		{HPSA Mesh Details} = {HPSA Mesh Details},
		JAVA_PATH_ID = JAVA_PATH_ID,
		{Last Update Date} = {Last Update Date},
		{Managed By} = {Managed By},

		PAI_Flag = PAI_Flag,
		Path = Path,
		{Path } = {Path },
		{Path Ind} = {Path Ind},
		{Path Vuln Chk} = {Path Vuln Chk},
		Path_ProductName = Path_ProductName,
		{Pending Escalation} = {Pending Escalation},
		{PRB Numb} = {PRB Numb},
		{PRB Number} = {PRB Number},
		{PRM#} = {PRM#},
		{Product Name} = {Product Name},
		{PW Exception ID} = {PW Exception ID},
		{PW Expiration Date} = {PW Expiration Date},
		{PW Expiration Dt} = {PW Expiration Dt},
		{PW Overall Status} = {PW Overall Status},
		QID = QID,

		REMED_QVRU_ASSET_CLASS_NM = REMED_QVRU_ASSET_CLASS_NM,
		{REMED_RESEARCH_COMMENTS_DESC } = {REMED_RESEARCH_COMMENTS_DESC },
		REMED_VO_DATA_ISSUE_NM = REMED_VO_DATA_ISSUE_NM,

		{SN CIO} = {SN CIO},

		{SN Status} = {SN Status},

		{VIIDWFGUID + Path} = {VIIDWFGUID + Path},
		{VIIDWFGUID + Path Count} = {VIIDWFGUID + Path Count},
		{VIIDWFGUID Path Vulns} = {VIIDWFGUID Path Vulns},
		{VIIDWFGUID w/o Path Vulns} = {VIIDWFGUID w/o Path Vulns},
		VIIDWFGUID_JAVAPATH = VIIDWFGUID_JAVAPATH,

		VULN_SUB_CATEGORY_NM = VULN_SUB_CATEGORY_NM,
		{Vulnerability Type} = {Vulnerability Type},
		{VulnInstance Count} = {VulnInstance Count},
		{WF Fix} = {WF Fix},
		{WF Rating} = {WF Rating},
		WFGUID = WFGUID,
		{WO Number} = {WO Number},
		{WS Workstream Name} = {WS Workstream Name},
		{WS Workstream POC} = {WS Workstream POC},
		{Year of ReportRunDate} = {Year of ReportRunDate},
		Z_VulnType = Z_VulnType,
		{z1#1} = {z1#1},
